TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Azerbaijan hya' ga cyux maki' tay 40 30 N, 47 30 E na Aziya' syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 86,600 sq km (maki' tay 113ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 82,629 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 3,971 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 9,872,765. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 57.60% , lhlahuy hya' ga 11.30%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 31.10%. arin inragan ke na Yasaypayzan skayal nha,mamu yasa qu Yasaypayzan lalu na qutux koka kani. gaga nha ga msqun gmwayaw mrhuw nha.cyux maki sa zyaw na o syu ru asyu,heh nqu knweyaswo. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Baku. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 28 na tay ymagal byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Ilham Aliyev, aring ryax tay 31 squ byacing tay 10 sa kawas 2003 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA 外交部
S.PHON: azerβaijan ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨjux makiʔ taj ** ** n, ** ** e na azijaʔ s~ɕjuw. kwaraʔ kiŋħʦ~ʨijan nijaʔ **,*** s~ɕq km (makiʔ taj ***ɣinkɣan kin waħʦ~ʨiʔ) (kinwħʦ~ʨiʔ nijaʔ ɣa **,*** s~ɕq km , kinwħʦ~ʨiʔ na laws~ɕajan ws~ɕiluŋ ħjaʔ ɣa *,*** s~ɕq km) kinkħmajan kwaraʔ s~ɕquliq ħjaʔ ɣa *,***,***. pinβʦ~ʨjan naħaʔ s~ɕniʔ naħaʔ rħzjal ħjaʔ ij pqmaħun ħjaʔ ɣa **.**% , lħlaħuj ħjaʔ ɣa **.**%, s~ɕniʔ naħaʔ s~ɕa pptzjuwaw s~ɕa βzinaħ ħjaʔ ɣa **.**%. arin inraɣan ke na jas~ɕajpajzan s~ɕkajal nħa,mamu jas~ɕa qu jas~ɕajpajzan lalu na qutux koka kani. ɣaɣa nħa ɣa ms~ɕqun ɣmwajaw mrħuw nħa.ʦ~ʨjux maki s~ɕa zjaw na o s~ɕju ru as~ɕju,ħeħ nqu knwejas~ɕwo. s~ɕpzjaŋ qalaŋ na kokkaʔ s~ɕpzjaŋ naħaʔ kraħuʔ qalaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa βaku. s~ɕnjan kinramat inluŋan na kokkaʔ s~ɕnjan kinramat inluŋan na kokkaʔ ħjaʔ ɣa ** na taj jmaɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ na qutux kawas~ɕ. mrħuw kokkaʔ mrħuw kokkaʔ taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa ilħam alije*, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj ** s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ ʦ~ʨia ***
S.FORM: Azerbaijan hya' ga cyux maki' tay 40 30 N, 47 30 E na Aziya' syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 86,600 sq km (maki' tay 113ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 82,629 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 3,971 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 9,872,765. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 57.60% , lhlahuy hya' ga 11.30%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 31.10%. arin inragan ke na Yasaypayzan skayal nha,mamu yasa qu Yasaypayzan lalu na qutux koka kani. gaga nha ga msqun gmwayaw mrhuw nha.cyux maki sa zyaw na o syu ru asyu,heh nqu knweyaswo. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Baku. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 28 na tay ymagal byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Ilham Aliyev, aring ryax tay 31 squ byacing tay 10 sa kawas 2003 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA 外交部
S.PHON: azerβaijan ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨjux makiʔ taj ** ** n, ** ** e na azijaʔ s~ɕjuw. kwaraʔ kiŋħʦ~ʨijan nijaʔ **,*** s~ɕq km (makiʔ taj ***ɣinkɣan kin waħʦ~ʨiʔ) (kinwħʦ~ʨiʔ nijaʔ ɣa **,*** s~ɕq km , kinwħʦ~ʨiʔ na laws~ɕajan ws~ɕiluŋ ħjaʔ ɣa *,*** s~ɕq km) kinkħmajan kwaraʔ s~ɕquliq ħjaʔ ɣa *,***,***. pinβʦ~ʨjan naħaʔ s~ɕniʔ naħaʔ rħzjal ħjaʔ ij pqmaħun ħjaʔ ɣa **.**% , lħlaħuj ħjaʔ ɣa **.**%, s~ɕniʔ naħaʔ s~ɕa pptzjuwaw s~ɕa βzinaħ ħjaʔ ɣa **.**%. arin inraɣan ke na jas~ɕajpajzan s~ɕkajal nħa,mamu jas~ɕa qu jas~ɕajpajzan lalu na qutux koka kani. ɣaɣa nħa ɣa ms~ɕqun ɣmwajaw mrħuw nħa.ʦ~ʨjux maki s~ɕa zjaw na o s~ɕju ru as~ɕju,ħeħ nqu knwejas~ɕwo. s~ɕpzjaŋ qalaŋ na kokkaʔ s~ɕpzjaŋ naħaʔ kraħuʔ qalaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa βaku. s~ɕnjan kinramat inluŋan na kokkaʔ s~ɕnjan kinramat inluŋan na kokkaʔ ħjaʔ ɣa ** na taj jmaɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ na qutux kawas~ɕ. mrħuw kokkaʔ mrħuw kokkaʔ taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa ilħam alije*, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj ** s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ ʦ~ʨia ***
